notes: Ships in weekly release cycle (~7 days). GTM must be pre-staged.
Feature flag fast rollout ~9 days to full availability. FF enablement date is the hard anchor.
Feature flag slow/phased rollout ~1 month. GTM can stagger early-access vs GA.
Hidden URL / preview server opt-in before GA. Closed-beta GTM opportunity.
Invite-only via backend FF; duration at PM discretion (placeholder 21d).
Open beta 8-12 weeks (max 12). Path A toggle / Path B Beta pill.
Experimental opt-in FF 4-12 weeks; may be pulled anytime.
General availability; full GTM activation across all teams.
Pre-kickoff product docs done well before release.
Docs/training/localization need source content ~3 weeks before.
Sales/marketing launch assets staged ~2 weeks before.
